title: aegiphila mollis var. longifolia
intro: Aegiphila mollis var. longifolia, also known as Long-leaved Aegiphila, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Long-leaved Aegiphila include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant's health benefits are said to include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Long-leaved Aegiphila can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
